title: StructuralFlags
description: Structural complexity flags published alongside a bond's tier hashes. NOT inputs to the hash. See SCHEMA.md §10.

is_sinker.description: Principal amortizes on a published schedule before maturity.

is_amortizing.description: Principal amortizes evenly across coupon dates.

is_callable.description: Issuer holds one or more call options.

is_putable.description: Holder holds one or more put options.

is_floater.description: Coupon resets against an index; the coupon field carries the current fixing only.

is_step_up.description: Coupon increases on a published schedule.

is_step_down.description: Coupon decreases on a published schedule.
